metadata.synopsis: When a rocket lands on Mars, the crew finds the planet not entirely dead. As the team begins to explore, they are attacked by horrific and demented creatures at every turn. Battling for their lives, can the survivors make it back to their ship?
metadata.title: The Angry Red Planet

metadata.synopsis: The streets of London are transformed into a smorgasbord for an alien creature with a taste for human flesh. Don't just panic…run for your lives!
metadata.title: The Quatermass Xperiment

metadata.synopsis: In this atmospheric horror classic directed by special effect legend Stan Winston, Ed Harley (Lance Henriksen) seeks the help of a witch to invoke the demon "Pumpkinhead" in order to exact revenge on the teenagers who inadvertently killed his son.
metadata.title: Pumpkinhead

metadata.synopsis: In this horror cult-classic, Vincent and his sister own the "Motel Hello," where they sell their delicious smoked meats made fresh on their farm. But something strange is going on over there. Folks are checking in...but no one is checking out!
metadata.title: Motel Hell

metadata.synopsis: Lefty Enright (Dennis Hopper) seeks to avenge the murder of his kin by Leatherface, Chop-Top, The Cook and Grandpa. With the help of a radio DJ he finds his way to their underground slaughter shop, where a battle of epic proportions will soon rage.
metadata.title: The Texas Chainsaw Massacre 2

metadata.synopsis: 65 years after a serial killer terrorized the town of Texarkana, the so-called 'moonlight murders' begin again. Is it a copycat or something even more sinister? A lonely high school girl, with dark secrets of her own, may be the key to catching him.
metadata.title: The Town That Dreaded Sundown (2014)

metadata.synopsis: The story focuses on Carlos, a former fighter from the Malvinas (Faulkland islands). Carlos lives in a large city square, under a gazebo that he found in the neighborhood. He tragically lost his family in the War. Times were not kind to Carlos. While looking to reunite with his son, he sweeps sidewalks in exchange for tips to help him survive winter nights which have a punishing effect on Carlo's health. Preparing for the coldest night of the year, driven by the impulse to make it, Carlos packs few belongings to seek refuge in a municipal locality. However, the luck again avoids him. An incident at the door of the shelter leaves Carlos unfairly outside. Completely unprotected, away from his usual spot, without shelter and weak health. The coldest night of the year is looming, and Carlos must face endless adversities in an uneven fight against two cruel enemies: loneliness and cold. Thus begins the coldest night only fueled by the desire to survive.
metadata.title: La noche más fría
